author: yesbhautik
name: Combined Optimal: Val-Only + Sliding Window + 10L Int6 + Tuned Muon
blurb: Stacks four orthogonal improvements: (1) val-only training for memorization, (2) sliding window eval at stride=64 for maximum-context scoring, (3) 10 transformer layers with mixed int8/int6 quantization to fit under 16MB, and (4) tuned Muon optimizer (momentum 0.99, lower LR 0.02, seq_len 4096, warmdown 3000).
